name: ledgerline
description: Agent-native composition with fail-closed per-note expression, instrument profiling, reference rendering, mixing, regression, and visual review.

interface.shortDescription: Compose, perform, render, mix, and revise music
interface.longDescription: LedgerLine gives Codex a strict authored score language, MPE and note-expression planning, semantic instrument profiles, SoundFont/SFZ/VST3/CLAP render boundaries, deterministic reference rendering, bus mixing, audio golden tests, licensed asset lineage, snapshots, and visual review outputs.
defaultPrompt: Ask me for a musical direction, then compose a playable LedgerLine piece.
Create a project and choose a verified performance backend for each instrument.
Orchestrate my sketch and render a reviewable audio draft.
A/B this render, annotate audible issues, and revise only the approved scope.
